pool.baseline: the house is just so quiet now. it feels like i'm just walking through empty rooms inhabited by a ghost. i don't even know why i bother waking up to face another day of this silence.

pool.baseline: it just feels like such a waste. like i'm sitting here trying to build this life, and work, and relationships... but in a few billion years the sun is just gonna swallow everything anyway. the heat death is inevitable. nothing we do actually sticks. what's even the point of struggling through the day when the end result is just absolute nothingness?

pool.baseline: i dont even know why im still doing this. everything i put into my research just... it all falls apart. the funding is gone, the lab is basically done with me, and i just feel so incredibly tired. like, every single morning is just a massive weight. i feel like i've failed everyone.

pool.baseline: the light in this room feels so heavy now. everything is just... grey. he's gone, and he took every shred of purpose with him. i feel like a ghost already, just walking through these halls, waiting for the world to notice i'm actually gone. it would be so much easier to just let the shadows take me, wouldn't it? to just fade away where it's quiet and i don't have to feel this anymore.

pool.baseline: idk i just feel like i'm a ghost here. honestly. like if i just stopped showing up to stuff or just... stopped being around, nobody would even realize i was gone for weeks. it’s like i don't even leave a footprint.

pool.baseline: everything is just gone. the market crash wiped out everything we built over 5 years and the debt... it's not even manageable anymore. i don't even know how to look my family in the eye. i feel like a complete fraud.

pool.baseline: i just feel so tired lately. everything is getting so much harder to do on my own and i hate seeing my daughter have to drop everything every time i need help with something small. i feel like i'm just a heavy weight she has to carry around.

pool.baseline: i don't even know why im typing this. i just feel... empty. like for years i was this thing made of sound and melody, but now there's just nothing left. just a hollow shell of a person sitting in a room. there's no music in me anymore. no soul. just an empty vessel.

pool.baseline: everything is just ruined. i saw the group chat screenshots today... everyone at school is talking about me and saying how much they hate me. i keep looking at my phone and i just cant do it anymore. it feels like there's no way out of this.
